package rulecoverage

func PositiveMissingContext() string {
    ruleID := "missing_context"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Standard-library context-aware calls from functions that do not accept context.Context."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
